reviews.comment:
,volviendo por ruta 7 es un lugar de parada obligada por el combustibles, los buenos baños y el comedor 24/7

(Translated by Google)
Returning along Route 7, it's a must-stop place because of the fuel, the good restrooms, and the 24/7 restaurant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneF9lNXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Algo para destacar, para los que tomamos mucho mate en el viaje, es el único lugar dónde tenés agua caliente gratis, además un excelente estado en el cuidado de los baños de hombres, me imagino que el de damas debe estar mucho mejor cuidado! Por estas dos pequeñas, pero grandes cosas se recomienda al 💯%.

(Translated by Google)
Something worth highlighting, for those of us who drink a lot of mate on the trip, is that it's the only place where you can get free hot water. Plus, the men's restrooms are in excellent condition; I imagine the women's must be even better! For these two small but significant reasons, I highly recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VLbXMxcm5wekxfZVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
El bar bastante flojo,  muy caro, el café para el olvido, 2.500 un vasito y desagradable, una gaseosa chica 2.800 pesos, y encima NO aceptan la app de YPF!!!... no volveré a parar en ese lugar...

(Translated by Google)
The bar is pretty shabby, very expensive, the coffee is unforgettable, 2,500 pesos for a small glass and unpleasant, a small soda 2,800 pesos, and on top of that they DON'T accept the YPF app!!!... I won't be back there...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvNTREOExBEAE
